name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Las Vegas, NV: TitleMax Title Loans at 8414 Farm Rd provides quick title loans Monday through Saturday for area residents.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates at 8414 Farm Rd Ste. 130 in Las Vegas, NV as a standalone storefront serving the local community. The location keeps convenient hours Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, making it accessible for Las Vegas residents who need title loan services.

This Las Vegas location specializes in title-based lending, offering fast cash loans for those who need immediate funds. Customers can call the location directly at +1 702-560-6264 during business hours to speak with a loan specialist about their options and apply for a title loan.

When Las Vegas residents need quick cash secured by their vehicle, this Farm Road location processes applications the same day. Bring a valid ID, proof of residence, and your vehicle title to complete the application. TitleMax Title Loans serves Las Vegas residents looking for fast emergency financing.
address: 8414 Farm Rd Ste. 130, Las Vegas, NV 89131

company_info.headquarters: 8414 Farm Rd Ste. 130, Las Vegas, NV 89131

pros: Same-day cash disbursement — funds available the day you apply
Most credit types accepted — vehicle value considered alongside credit score
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle throughout the loan term
Bilingual staff available at the Summer Avenue Memphis location
5.0/5 average rating from 481+ Google reviews at this location
Dual product offering: secured title loans AND unsecured flex lines of credit
Store has operated continuously since February 2007 — 17+ years of local presence
cons: APR and fee information not disclosed on the store page — cost transparency is poor
Vehicle repossession risk if borrower cannot repay the title loan
Online unsecured line of credit limited to 11 states — not nationally available
Closed Sundays; Saturday hours end at 4:00 pm, limiting access on weekends
Credit check is still performed despite messaging around credit flexibility
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need cash the same day and have exhausted cheaper options
Borrowers with poor or thin credit who do not qualify for traditional personal loans
Memphis-area residents who prefer bilingual financial services in person
Consumers who want a revolving line of credit they can draw from incrementally rather than a lump-sum loan
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for borrowers who own their vehicle outright, need emergency cash within hours, and cannot access cheaper credit. The primary caveat is the combination of undisclosed APRs, high typical industry rates for title loans, and the real risk of losing one's vehicle — making this a legitimate last resort rather than a routine financial tool.
services: Flex line of credit (secured by vehicle title)
Online loan applications (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
meta_description: Las Vegas, NV – TitleMax Title Loans at 8414 Farm Rd Ste. 130 offers fast title loans with same-day application processing.
